reference: Hi, may I answer your health queries right now? My twenty-one-month-old daughter hit her head in a fall about an hour ago. She is acting quite normally, playing, eating, and talking, but her lips are a little blue, especially the top one. Should I be concerned about this?
text: Hi, may I answer your health queries right now? My twenty-one-month-old daughter hit her head in a fall about an hour ago. She is acting quite normally—playing, eating, and talking—but her lips are a little blue, especially the top one. Should I be concerned about this?
